forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: ee80
+project: skills-guide-review
+title: Add `compatibility` field to skills with tool prerequisites
+---
+## What
+
+The Anthropic guide (Chapter 2, "Field requirements") defines the optional `compatibility` field to "indicate environment requirements: e.g. intended product, required system packages, network access needs". Several builtin skills have hard dependencies that warrant this:
+
+- `code-context`, `detected-projects`, `explore`, `map`, `lsp`, `commit`, `coverage`, `deduplicate`, `plan`, `task`, `implement`, `review`, `double-check` ŌĆö depend on the `code_context` MCP tool.
+- `shell` ŌĆö depends on the `shell` MCP tool / shelltool.
+- `kanban`, `task`, `plan`, `finish`, `implement`, `review`, `test`, `test-loop`, `coverage`, `deduplicate` ŌĆö depend on the `kanban` MCP tool.
+- `finish`, `test-loop` ŌĆö depend on `ralph` MCP tool and Stop-hook capable harness.
+
+Declaring these makes the skill portable across Claude.ai, Claude Code, and API as the guide intends.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Each skill that requires non-builtin tooling has a `compatibility` string (1ŌĆō500 chars) describing it.
+- [ ] Content mentions the concrete MCP server or system-tool dependency.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Spot-check three skills to confirm frontmatter is valid YAML after the change.
+
+## Reference
+
+Anthropic guide, Chapter 2 ŌĆö "Field requirements / compatibility".
\ No newline at end of file

changes.value:
## What

The Anthropic guide (Chapter 2, "Field requirements") defines the optional `compatibility` field to "indicate environment requirements: e.g. intended product, required system packages, network access needs". Several builtin skills have hard dependencies that warrant this:

- `code-context`, `detected-projects`, `explore`, `map`, `lsp`, `commit`, `coverage`, `deduplicate`, `plan`, `task`, `implement`, `review`, `double-check` ŌĆö depend on the `code_context` MCP tool.
- `shell` ŌĆö depends on the `shell` MCP tool / shelltool.
- `kanban`, `task`, `plan`, `finish`, `implement`, `review`, `test`, `test-loop`, `coverage`, `deduplicate` ŌĆö depend on the `kanban` MCP tool.
- `finish`, `test-loop` ŌĆö depend on `ralph` MCP tool and Stop-hook capable harness.

Declaring these makes the skill portable across Claude.ai, Claude Code, and API as the guide intends.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Each skill that requires non-builtin tooling has a `compatibility` string (1ŌĆō500 chars) describing it.
- [ ] Content mentions the concrete MCP server or system-tool dependency.

## Tests

- [ ] Spot-check three skills to confirm frontmatter is valid YAML after the change.

## Reference

Anthropic guide, Chapter 2 ŌĆö "Field requirements / compatibility".
Add `compatibility` field to skills with tool prerequisites
